data.title: Former Sen. Joe Manchin to discuss new book "Dead Center" on Jan. 8 at National Press Club. Book explores political gridlock.
data.description: On January 8 at 6 p.m., at a Headliners Book Event, former U.S. Senator Joe Manchin is set to present his book "Dead Center: In Defense of Common Sense." The book, which combines elements of a memoir and a manifesto, will be the focus of the event. Interested individuals can register for the event to attend and hear from Manchin himself. The discussion is scheduled to take place in Washington and promises to provide insights into his views.
FIFA World Cup draw officially begins after host nations picked out of draw earlier

data.title: Analysts cut Sportsman's Warehouse forecasts after Q3 results; EPS 8 cents, sales $331.323M, FY25 net sales flat.
data.description: Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: SPWH) announced its third-quarter earnings, with earnings per share at 8 cents, meeting analyst expectations. The company reported quarterly sales of $331.323 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $331.120 million. Sportsman's Warehouse anticipates net sales for FY25 to remain flat to slightly up, with adjusted EBITDA expected to be between $22 million to $26 million. The company highlighted positive same-store sales growth for the third consecutive period, driven by strong performances in hunting, fishing, firearms, and personal protection categories. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: The Westin San Diego Gaslamp Quarter offers holiday packages and festive dining for locals and travelers in Southern California.
data.description: Discover the perfect holiday escape in Southern California by exploring holiday happenings and hotel deals in San Diego's Gaslamp Quarter. The Westin San Diego Gaslamp Quarter is welcoming both locals and visitors to enjoy a festive season filled with exciting events and exclusive accommodations. Unleash the magic of the holidays in one of the city's most vibrant districts.

data.title: Clinical Education Alliance rebrands to Decera Clinical, debuts at ASH Annual Meeting in Dec 2025. Located in Reston, with a scientific mission.
data.description: A company is showcasing its Scientific Activation™ mission at the ASH Annual Meeting after rebranding in November. Clinical Education Alliance changed its name to Decera Clinical and is now making its official market debut. The announcement was made on December 5, 2025, in Reston, Virginia. This rebranding event marks an important milestone for the company as it transitions to Decera Clinical.

data.title: Sierra7 received 2025 Platinum HIRE Vets Medallion Award from US Department of Labor, following Gold award in 2024.
data.description: Sierra7, a prominent provider of government healthcare and technology services based in McLean, Virginia, was recently honored with the 2025 Platinum HIRE Vets Medallion Award by the US Department of Labor. This award recognizes their exceptional commitment to hiring and retaining veterans. This accolade comes after the company secured the Gold HIRE Vets Medallion Award in 2024, illustrating their ongoing dedication to supporting veterans in their workforce. This prestigious recognition highlights Sierra7's efforts in providing opportunities to veterans, with the company consistently demonstrating excellence in this regard.

data.title: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. closed $230M IPO, selling 23M units at $10 each, including full over-allotment option.
data.description: Activate Energy Acquisition Corp. publicly disclosed the finalization of its IPO, comprising 23,000,000 units valued at $10.00 each on Nasdaq under the symbol AEAQU.

data.title: Techficient launches Surefire, a modern underwriting engine streamlining life insurance process. Dec 5, 2025. #Insurtech
data.description: Today in Boise, Idaho, on December 5, 2025, Techficient, a prominent player in Insurtech solutions, revealed the debut of Surefire, a comprehensive life insurance underwriting tool aimed at enhancing and expediting the underwriting process. This technology caters to streamlining the entire underwriting journey for a smoother and more efficient experience.

data.title: SAGA Metals raises C$6.0 million in oversubscribed LIFE offering.
data.description: SAGA Metals has successfully completed an oversubscribed brokered LIFE offering, raising C$6.0 million in gross proceeds.

data.title: Paramount made a $30/share all-cash bid for Warner Bros. Discovery, but it was rejected.
data.description: On Thursday night, Paramount Skydance made a final all-cash offer of $30 per share to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery. Despite this last-ditch effort, Warner Bros. rejected the bid. The attempted acquisition was reported by CNBC.

data.title: Meta stock may rally with metaverse spending cuts per Mizuho analysts, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Analysis by Mizuho analysts suggests that Meta's stock may experience a notable surge if it proceeds with its intention to reduce spending on the metaverse. This move could potentially trigger a substantial rally for Meta stock, as stated by analysts.

data.title: CNN will not be part of Netflix’s Warner Bros. deal. Paramount's acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery sparks speculation for CNN’s potential merger with CBS News, but CNN will stay as a distinct entity.
data.description: The possibility of Paramount acquiring Warner Bros. Discovery prompted speculation among CNN reporters about a potential merger with CBS News. However, CNN will maintain its autonomy within its existing corporate structure, keeping the two news organizations separate.

data.title: MSTR reduces Bitcoin accumulation, creates $1.44 billion reserve to cover expenses for 12-24 months, limiting downside risk.
data.description: Strategy's (NASDAQ: MSTR) Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) accumulation has significantly slowed in 2025, but experts believe that its strengthened reserves could greatly reduce risks this cycle. A recent report by CryptoQuant reveals a notable change in Strategy's treasury strategy. Instead of aggressively acquiring Bitcoin through debt and equity as before, the company now holds a substantial $1.44 billion U.S. dollar reserve. This reserve is carefully planned to cover all preferred dividends and interest expenses for at least a year, with intentions to extend it to two years. This shift signifies a move towards a dual-reserve system, with one part comprising long-term BTC holdings and the other consisting of short-term U.S. currency reserves.

data.title: Samsara's Q3 earnings beat estimates, with revenue reaching $415.98M, up from $321.98M last year. ARR stands at $1.75B.
data.description: Samsara, Inc. (NYSE: IOT) announced positive third-quarter results, with reported earnings of 15 cents per share surpassing the expected 12 cents per share. The company's quarterly revenue reached $415.98 million, exceeding the projected $398.47 million and showing growth from the previous year's $321.98 million. Samsara concluded Q3 with $1.75 billion in ARR, according to CEO Sanjit Biswas, highlighting the firm's solid and effective expansion. The CEO credited the growth to collaborations with major global physical operations organizations. Following this news, ServiceTitan's stock price surged by 15.6% to reach $47.07 on Friday. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
